text:
and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: -1 through 125 

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: In the monthly TAF, if AGE_NUM is greater than 125, then AGE_NUM is set equal to 125. An age less 
than zero is possible when the state covers the health of a fetus or the child during the gestational 
period. 

This age value is calculated using the date of birth in the eligibility file (or, if not populated, then most 
recent date of birth value from the two-prior year[s] is used). 
 ^
